core.models.raw_energy_measurement module

RAW ENERGY MEASUREMENT – Layer 1: Ground Truth

This class represents pure raw measurement data from hardware counters. NEVER modified after creation. Contains only raw readings, no corrections.

Author: Deepak Panigrahy

class core.models.raw_energy_measurement.RawEnergyMeasurement(measurement_id: str, start_time: float, end_time: float, duration_seconds: float, rapl_start_uj: ~typing.Dict[str, int], rapl_end_uj: ~typing.Dict[str, int], perf: ~typing.Any, turbostat: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>, thermal: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>, power_state: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>, scheduler_start: ~typing.Dict | None = None, scheduler_end: ~typing.Dict | None = None, scheduler_metrics: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>, msr_metrics: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>, thermal_during_experiment: int | None = None, thermal_now_active: int | None = None, thermal_since_boot: int | None = None, samples: ~typing.List[tuple] = <factory>, sampling_rate_hz: float = 0.0, thermal_samples: ~typing.List[~typing.Tuple[float, ~typing.Dict, bool]] = <factory>, metadata: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Layer 1 – Raw measurement data. NEVER modified.

This is your primary evidence. All fields are stored as read from hardware. No baseline correction, no derived values – just raw truth.

measurement_id

Unique identifier for this measurement

Type:

str

start_time

Unix timestamp when measurement started

Type:

float

end_time

Unix timestamp when measurement ended

Type:

float

duration_seconds

Total duration in seconds

Type:

float

rapl_start_uj

Raw RAPL readings at start (microjoules)

Type:

Dict[str, int]

rapl_end_uj

Raw RAPL readings at end (microjoules)

Type:

Dict[str, int]

perf

Performance counter readings (PerformanceCounters object)

Type:

Any

turbostat

Turbostat continuous monitoring data (dictionary with dataframe, summary)

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

thermal

Temperature readings

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

power_state

CPU power state data

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

scheduler_metrics

Scheduler metrics with deltas

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

samples

List of high-frequency samples (timestamp, energy)

Type:

List[tuple]

sampling_rate_hz

Actual sampling rate achieved

Type:

float

metadata

Additional context (hostname, kernel, cpu_affinity, etc.)

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

property core_energy_uj: int

Compute raw core energy delta in microjoules.

property dram_energy_uj: int | None

Compute raw DRAM energy delta if available.

duration_seconds: float
end_time: float
measurement_id: str
metadata: Dict[str, Any]
msr_metrics: Dict[str, Any]
property package_energy_j: float

Package energy in joules (for convenience).

property package_energy_uj: int

Compute raw package energy delta in microjoules.

perf: Any
power_state: Dict[str, Any]
rapl_end_uj: Dict[str, int]
rapl_start_uj: Dict[str, int]
samples: List[tuple]
sampling_rate_hz: float = 0.0
scheduler_end: Dict | None = None
scheduler_metrics: Dict[str, Any]
scheduler_start: Dict | None = None
start_time: float
thermal: Dict[str, Any]
thermal_during_experiment: int | None = None
thermal_now_active: int | None = None
thermal_samples: List[Tuple[float, Dict, bool]]
thermal_since_boot: int | None = None
to_dict() → Dict[str, Any][source]

Convert to dictionary for serialization.

to_json() → str[source]

Serialize to JSON for permanent storage.

turbostat: Dict[str, Any]
